zh.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Cruwys I,Baron Cruwys of Morchard是Sir Richard de CRUWYS Lord of Cruwys Morchard的兒子，於1166年出生在英國英格蘭戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德。他於大約1189年與Constance在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1231年10月13日在英國英格蘭戴文迪維頓享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cruwys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Cruwys I,Baron Cruwys of Morchard was born in 1166, in Cruwys Morchard, Devon, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Richard de CRUWYS Lord of Cruwys Morchard. He married Constance about 1189, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 October 1231, in Tiverton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Cruwys I,Baron Cruwys of Morchard est né en 1166, à Cruwys Morchard, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir Richard de CRUWYS Lord of Cruwys Morchard. Il a épousé Constance environ 1189, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1231, à Tiverton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Cruwys I,Baron Cruwys of Morchardは1166年にイギリスイギリスデボンクルウイス モーチャードでSir Richard de CRUWYS Lord of Cruwys Morchardの息子として生まれた。約1189年にイギリスイギリスデボンでConstanceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1231年10月13日にイギリスイギリスデボンティバートンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Cruwys I,Baron Cruwys of Morchard(은)는 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 크루w이스 모르처드에서 Sir Richard de CRUWYS Lord of Cruwys Morchard의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Constance(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1231년 10월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 티버턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Cruwys I,Baron Cruwys of Morchard родился в 1166 г. в местности крувис морчард, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Sir Richard de CRUWYS Lord of Cruwys Morchard. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance около 1189 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 октября 1231 г. в местности тивиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.
